compiled_state.title: Outbound Bridge push rejected when tickets branch updated during bridge run
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). Root cause evident from CI logs: git push rejected because tickets branch was updated by merge-to-main.sh during bridge run. Commit step at line 157 does plain push with no fetch-rebase retry.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
